purpose: Machine-readable completion audit for the OPL DomainProgressTransitionRuntime and MAS PaperProgressPolicyAdapter target chain.
machine_boundary: This audit records completion evidence and open tails only. It does not create OPL commands, events, outbox items, StageRun identity, provider attempts, MAS owner receipts, typed blockers, human gates, route-back evidence, paper deltas, publication verdicts, artifact mutations, current package freshness, production readiness, or live paper progress.

overall.current_summary: OPL runtime slice, MAS policy adapter consumption, replay expansion, projection demotion, live-readback-only admission boundary, terminal closeout currentness, provider-hosted stale admission recovery, and MAS runtime-health local event append retirement have landed. The full equivalence target is still open because live DHD apply exactly-one outcome, OPL outbox/StageRun live readback, full provider-admission consumption, and DM002/DM003 fresh paper-line outcome are not closed. paper_recovery_state now treats request-only current_work_unit/provider-admission projections as diagnostic until a complete OPL live readback is present, and OPL current-control terminal closeout consumption no longer lets identity-bound admissions fall back to weak action/work-unit/fingerprint matching.

hundred_percent_requires: fresh executable evidence for the requirement scope
same identity runtime readback when runtime authority is claimed
owner receipt, stable typed blocker, human gate, route-back evidence, or paper/gate/artifact semantic delta when paper progress is claimed

feature_audit.correct_owner: OPL Pack/Stagecraft plus MAS policy mapping
feature_audit.target: Fixed transitions for owner receipt, provider attempt, terminal closeout, typed blocker, human gate, paper/gate delta, route-back, stop-loss, and NonAdvancingApply.
evidence: OPL runtime tests cover normalized transitions and NonAdvancingApply.
MAS policy adapter and replay fixtures cover representative paper-domain transition kinds.
feature_audit.open_gap: Live acceptance still needs OPL runtime event plus MAS owner-answer evidence for DM002/DM003.

feature_audit.target: Every transition binds study_id, work_unit_id, fingerprint, source_generation, expected_version, and idempotency_key.
evidence: OPL runtime tests cover aggregate version and idempotency readback.
MAS adapter and replay tests assert clean request identity without OPL artifact fields.
feature_audit.open_gap: Fresh live DHD apply and provider admission must prove the same aggregate identity reaches OPL StageRun readback.

feature_audit.target: MAS judges owner receipt, blocker semantics, paper delta validity, publication gate progress, forbidden write, human gate, route-back, and domain authority result shapes.
evidence: tests/test_paper_progress_policy_adapter.py covers authority-only adapter fields and forbidden OPL runtime fields.
tests/test_paper_progress_transition_replay_fixtures.py covers representative DM002/DM003 policy outcomes.
feature_audit.open_gap: More live owner-answer shapes must be proven by fresh DM002/DM003 outcomes, not only fixtures.

feature_audit.target: MAS request is normalized into OPL command; legacy alias and MAS runtime artifact fields fail closed.
evidence: OPL tests cover MAS policy request normalization and legacy supervisor apply alias rejection.
MAS tests assert transition request excludes projection_metadata, OPL event, OPL outbox, and StageRun identity.
feature_audit.open_gap: Live OPL intake must continue proving normalized command/event/outbox for fresh DM002/DM003 requests.

feature_audit.target: Append-only command/event authority log; corrections append new events rather than overwriting read models.
evidence: OPL JSONL runtime tests cover append-only command/event/outbox log and readback.
OPL decisions record physical command_event_log.jsonl live intake behavior.
feature_audit.open_gap: Production/live paper-line soak and terminal closeout side effects are still evidence tails.

feature_audit.target: Transition event and provider/human/owner callable outbox are persisted in one transaction boundary.
evidence: OPL tests assert event and outbox committed together in runtime results.
MAS provider admission boundary requires OPL live readback instead of MAS self-signed outbox.
feature_audit.open_gap: Fresh live outbox identity must be read back for DM002/DM003 transition requests.

feature_audit.target: Provider attempt, lease, execution authorization, and closeout binding read back the same identity.
evidence: OPL provider-hosted tests cover currentness, stale admission recovery, and StageRun identity guards.
MAS closeout/StageRun identity split replay converges to a stable typed blocker.
OPL current-control terminal closeout matching now requires bound StageRun/route/idempotency/packet identity for identity-bound admissions and rejects weak action/work-unit/fingerprint fallback.
feature_audit.open_gap: DM002/DM003 still need fresh same-identity StageRun readback tied to current paper-line transition.

feature_audit.target: Read, decide, apply, readback, and repeat until stable; each round yields exactly-one outcome.
evidence: OPL runtime tests cover fixed-point helper choosing exactly one transition or NonAdvancingApply.
MAS DHD boundary documents exactly-one postcondition requirements.
feature_audit.open_gap: DHD apply live path has not yet proven end-to-end exactly-one closure for DM002/DM003 under the new runtime.

feature_audit.target: Apply cannot only refresh projection; it must yield running, receipt, blocker, human gate, route-back, semantic delta, or NonAdvancingApply.
evidence: MAS replay fixtures and terminal closeout currentness tests prevent projection-only success for representative cases.
DHD policy states transition_request_pending is not postcondition_ok without OPL readback.
feature_audit.open_gap: Fresh live DHD apply outcome remains open by current instructions and must not be inferred from dry-run.

feature_audit.correct_owner: OPL Runway plus MAS blocker semantics
feature_audit.target: Same identity apply that does not advance writes a stable typed blocker instead of returning ok.
evidence: OPL runtime tests cover NonAdvancingApply.
MAS replay fixtures and terminal closeout currentness tests cover request-only and record-only no-progress cases.
feature_audit.open_gap: Live DHD apply must still show NonAdvancingApply or another accepted outcome when explicitly delegated.

feature_audit.target: DM002/DM003 bad histories replay to exactly-one or NonAdvancingApply.
evidence: contracts/paper_progress_replay_live_evidence_status.json enumerates representative replay coverage.
tests/test_paper_progress_transition_replay_fixtures.py covers DM002/DM003 historical bad traces.
feature_audit.open_gap: Replay is broad but not a substitute for fresh live paper-line acceptance.

feature_audit.correct_owner: OPL Runway/Console with MAS answer semantics
feature_audit.target: Human gate token, pause/resume, and accepted answer readback are OPL-persisted; MAS interprets answer semantics.
evidence: OPL runtime tests cover human gate resume token issue/readback/consume/idempotent replay.
MAS replay fixtures accept human gate and route-back evidence shapes.
feature_audit.open_gap: No fresh DM002/DM003 human-gate resume chain has closed this target.

feature_audit.correct_owner: OPL Console/Vault and derived MAS projections
feature_audit.target: study_progress, DHD, Workbench, and current surfaces rebuild from OPL events plus MAS policy result, not local authority.
evidence: MAS projection metadata demotes authority and live-readback-only provider admission.
MAS runtime-health local event append API is retired.
feature_audit.open_gap: Workbench and all downstream projections still need fresh live proof of full event-driven rebuild under real paper-line flow.

feature_audit.correct_owner: OPL runtime consumer plus MAS adapter
feature_audit.target: DHD apply triggers or consumes OPL fixed-point runtime and does not self-sign provider admission.
evidence: MAS DHD contracts fail closed request-only transitions without OPL readback.
Focused tests cover consume-only and live-readback-only admission boundaries.
feature_audit.open_gap: Current session did not run DHD apply; fresh live exactly-one apply outcome is still required before completion.

feature_audit.target: Provider admission accepts only OPL transition outbox or StageRun identity, not MAS projection residue.
evidence: OPL current-control and provider-hosted tests cover transition runtime payload, stale admission recovery, and single-flight guards.
MAS arbiter tests require OPL live readback for provider_admission_pending.
Paper recovery state now requires complete OPL live readback before current provider-admission projections can suppress stale parked/operator projections.
OPL current-control handoff projection preserves runtime-backed provider admission when a stale terminal closeout lacks bound identity, even if action/work-unit/fingerprint match.
feature_audit.open_gap: Fresh DM002/DM003 provider admission/running proof remains open; repo evidence now blocks request-only current_work_unit/provider-admission projections and stale unbound terminal closeouts from acting as admission evidence.

feature_audit.target: current_work_unit projects current aggregate but does not choose or authorize the next action.
evidence: Projection metadata authority demotion tests are in place.
Terminal closeout currentness now blocks same-identity record-only re-execution.
Current work unit provider_admission_pending booleans without complete OPL live readback no longer count as provider admission evidence in paper recovery state.
Identity-bound current-control admissions are not cleared by stale terminal closeouts that only match action/work-unit/fingerprint.
feature_audit.open_gap: Full consume-only derivation from OPL transition event remains tied to live apply/readback closure.

feature_audit.target: current_executable_owner_action displays OPL event plus MAS policy result only; it is not an authority selector.
evidence: Same-identity NonAdvancingApply and terminal closeout filters suppress stale executable owner action.
DM003 fresh readback after the v2 lane showed owner_receipt_recorded with current_executable_owner_action null.
feature_audit.open_gap: Projection still needs long-tail live proof across other owner-answer families.

feature_audit.target: Paper recovery semantics remain MAS-owned, while materialization, admission, and fixed-point runtime are OPL-owned.
evidence: Paper recovery read models no longer suffice as provider admission.
MAS replay fixtures distinguish domain policy result from OPL runtime authority.
Paper recovery state regression tests cover request-only provider admission candidates and current_work_unit pending booleans as projection repair, not admission.
Current-control handoff projection keeps live-readback-backed admission pending until the terminal closeout binds the same OPL identity.
feature_audit.open_gap: Remaining live materialization and closeout paths must prove OPL runtime-backed transitions.

feature_audit.correct_owner: OPL Console plus MAS domain projection
feature_audit.target: Workbench/Portal display current owner, accepted answer shape, and evidence refs without becoming a second truth source.
evidence: Projection metadata and runtime inventory identify non-authority display surfaces.
feature_audit.open_gap: Workbench/Portal still need event-driven rebuild proof from OPL transition event plus MAS policy result.

feature_audit.target: Delete or tombstone MAS private kernel, alias, selector/materializer authority, and local runtime-like surfaces.
evidence: MAS runtime-health local append API is retired.
Runtime surface inventory tracks remaining private surface tails.

domain_owner_action_dispatch has repo-level coverage for missing OPL proof fail-closed across every supported action, trusted OPL authorization, bound DomainProgressTransitionRuntime readback, and provider-hosted exact StageRun authorization.
feature_audit.open_gap: Remaining carriers, selector/materializer authority, live dispatcher soak, physical delete gates, and no-active-caller scans still require closeout evidence.

feature_audit.target: DM002 and DM003 must show fresh running proof, receipt, stable blocker, human gate, route-back, or semantic paper/gate/artifact delta.
evidence: Recent readbacks show DM002 stable typed blocker and DM003 owner receipt recorded after currentness fixes.
feature_audit.open_gap: Fresh live paper semantic delta, route-back evidence, human gate, strict running proof, or OPL-readback-backed admission is still required; dry-run and projection cleanliness are not enough.

evidence: Planning and contract language now place generic transition runtime under OPL and leave MAS as policy adapter.
phase_audit.open_gap: No boundary-correction gap remains for this phase; later phases still require executable evidence.

evidence: MAS emits OPL transition request and OPL normalizes runtime commands in repo tests.
phase_audit.open_gap: Fresh live request-command-outbox readback remains required.

evidence: OPL runtime tests cover command/event/outbox append and readback.
phase_audit.open_gap: DM002/DM003 live outbox and StageRun identity readback remains required.

evidence: OPL fixed-point helper and MAS postcondition boundaries are covered by repo tests.
phase_audit.open_gap: DHD apply exactly-one live outcome remains open.

evidence: DM002/DM003 replay fixtures cover representative historical failure traces.
phase_audit.open_gap: Replay coverage still does not equal live paper-line acceptance.

evidence: Projection metadata and runtime inventory demote several authority surfaces.
Paper recovery state no longer lets request-only current_work_unit/provider-admission projections suppress projection repair without complete OPL live readback.
OPL current-control terminal closeout consumption now preserves identity-bound live-readback provider admissions unless the closeout matches the same StageRun/route/idempotency/packet identity.
phase_audit.open_gap: All downstream read models must still rebuild from OPL event plus MAS policy result, and live paper-line acceptance remains open.

evidence: OPL tests cover human gate resume token semantics.
phase_audit.open_gap: No fresh DM002/DM003 human-gate resume readback has closed the phase.

evidence: Runtime-health local append API is retired and inventory tracks remaining surfaces.

domain_owner_action_dispatch repo tests cover fail-closed typed blockers for missing proof across every supported action, trusted OPL authorization, bound transition readback, and exact provider-hosted StageRun authorization.
phase_audit.open_gap: Remaining private runtime residue needs live every-active-caller soak, no-active-caller, tombstone, or physical deletion evidence.

evidence: Fresh readbacks have shown stable blocker/owner receipt states but not paper progress completion.
phase_audit.open_gap: DM002/DM003 must each show an accepted live outcome family before full completion.

required_before_goal_complete.required_evidence: Fresh DHD apply, when explicitly delegated, must produce exactly one accepted live outcome family rather than projection refresh, observe_only, or dry-run evidence.
Same-transition OPL command/event/outbox readback must include event_id, outbox_item_id, stage_run_identity, causality, authority boundary, and projection metadata.
Provider admission must consume OPL transition event/outbox/StageRun identity and reject MAS projection residue or MAS self-signed admission.
DM002 and DM003 must each have fresh live owner receipt, stable typed blocker, human gate, route-back evidence, strict running proof, or paper/gate/artifact semantic delta.

Remaining MAS private runtime-like surfaces must be physically retired, tombstoned, or proven diagnostic/provenance-only with no active authority caller. Current repo evidence proves domain_authority_refs_index is body-free refs-only with no active authority caller and repo-level OPL StateIndexKernel replacement parity, and domain_health_diagnostic_obligation_actuator is consume-only/fail-closed; physical deletion still requires live OPL takeover, no-active-caller or owner-retirement evidence, and tombstone/provenance.

gate_evidence_status.target_role: Define transition taxonomy, aggregate identity, projection metadata, fixed-point postcondition, and forbidden interpretations.
Cover DM002/DM003 bad trajectories and converge each trace to exactly one transition or NonAdvancingApply.
OPL owns command/event/outbox append, idempotency, StageRun identity, NonAdvancingApply, live readback, and read-model rebuild metadata.
